name_en: Top-tier Original【Exclusive Photo M46933 Monogram】The Scott bag is crafted from Monogram canvas, reinterpreting the classic Scott cylindrical case with a modern touch. The top handle and detachable, adjustable natural leather shoulder strap exude a striking look, while the glossy S-lock closure recalls the brand's traditional trunks. 13.5 x 9 x 11.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)
